feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Process Integration
feed.subtitle: SAP Process Integration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Integrate Solman and ServiceNow using SAP CPI or PO as middleware.
entry.content:
There is a requirement to Integrate Solman with ServiceNow using a middleware. SNMP Trap is being used at the Solman side. Is it possible to use SAP CPI or PO in this scenario as middleware?
And if SNMP Trap is avoided, is there any different way to send data to middleware?

Any information will be much appreciated.
Thank You.

entry.title: SAP PI with multiple inbound calls
entry.content:
Hi experts.

I have scenario where an external system makes a call to PI, then PI use that information to make a call to SAP and using the information returned from SAP, it makes another call to a third party API that will generate some data, that will passed to the original consumer (the external system). Also, the third party API uses OAuth 2.0, I don't know if this affects the scenario.

Is this scenario possible and/or is there a better aprocach to it? And how I would configure this in an ICO? 

Attached image for clarification

entry.title: Any Online Editor Available for Groovy SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Are there any alternative online SAP CPI Groovy editors available besides https://groovyide.com/cpi? The https://groovyide.com/cpi server is currently unavailable.

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Integration possibilities from SAP CI(Integration Suite) to SWIFT???
entry.content:
Hi All,

While i was exploring the integration possibilities from CI to SWIFT had few questions around this as below.

1. If the integration has to be from S4HANA then there is a direct connector available for SWIFT which we can start configuring from SPRO tcode without the need of CI . Is is the best approach comparing to the other available options???

2. If the connector is not available might be S4HANA release issue or for normal ECC system then that case the traditional way of generating the file in AL11 from where CI will pick the drop onto the target system with all sort of security parameters(encryption/signature) maintained. We dont have standard prepackaged content like what we had for SWIFT SWCV in PI/PO??? Also the SFTP 3.0 which was used in PI/PO for SWIFT integration with the module configurations. How it can be accompanied in CI??? Are there any technical glitches???

3. Any other mechanisms for this integrations???

Please do share your thoughts on this.

Thank You.

Regards,

Farooq

entry.title: Event mesh S/4hana on-premise
entry.content:
hi,

I created a queue on the Event Mesh, how can I direct just one event to this queue? For example, when creating the Business Partner on S/4hana on-premise

I saw that it is necessary to insert the topic name of the queue but it doesn't work for me.

but it only works when I enter * but in this case it intercepts all events:

 

Does anyone know what might be missing?

thank you

entry.title: HTML to PDF in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello All,

Would it be possible to convert HTML to PDF in SAP CPI?

Regards,

Naresh

entry.title: JMS Receiver channel ping issue.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While performing  the receiver ping channel, I am getting below error for Destination Test. Could you please suggest possible issue and solution.  But end to end message flow happing!! 

Error message in channel ping :

Destination TestChecks for a valid temporary destination object

Thanks,

T Chandar

entry.title: Looking for generic DELVRY03 SHPCON schema
entry.content: Looking for generic DELVRY03 SHPCON schema to map too from EDI in github repo

entry.title: How to maintain/display 'Contact Information' tab in PO/PI message monitoring page?
entry.content:
Hi, Who knows how to maintain/display 'Contact Information' tab in PO/PI message monitoring page? If the contact information can record the owner info of sender or receiver system, it will be very helpful and useful for operation work with more efficiency and convenience.

Any feedback will be appreciated.

entry.title: SAP PI/PO to CIG Integration
entry.content:
Hello colleagues,

(Required solution on URGENT basis)
customer have already existing PI/PO (On Premise) and build our own mapping in the PI/PO.

We are faced with the challenge that we want to connect CIG with the SAP PI/PO (On Prem).

When we enable integration via PI middleware in sap s4/hana we do not see the option for web services while set up the interface. Please find attached screenshot for your reference.

SPRO>>SAP Reference IMG>> Integration with other sap components>>manage gateway spend&network for buyer>>Global setting>>Enable integration Via PI middleware

While setting up the business network interface.

Please provide the step for how to configure web services for integration via PI middleware.

Kindly suggest solution for PI/PO to CIG connectivity.

entry.title: SAP PI - Determine the receiver based on Source FileName
entry.content:
Hi all,

Ive an issue regarding receiver determination based on a Source FileName.

Ive a file to file scenario without any ESR objects. 

The FileNames look like this:

CRM_12345_TimeStamp
CRM_<all Other Values>_TimeStamp

Based on the source FileName I need to send Files containing the value 12345 to Receiver 1 and all Files containing other values except 12345 to Receiver 2

I try this in the Iflow:

(ContextObject.FileName CP "*12345*") --> Reiceiver 1  --> This is working

(ContextObject.FileName != "*12345*") --> Reiceiver 2  --> This is NOT working

Ive red that (Not) Equal to with a Wilcard (*) is not working.

So what is the solution here? How can I achieve this and solve this issue?

Your help is appreciated,

Kind regards

John

entry.title: Integration object creation with one to one relation with same item type.
entry.content:
I need to create integration object where product has an attribute called relatedProduct with 1-1 relation.
Example:
Product- A has relatedProduct B and I want to save the reference of B into A.

Product
code(unique)
relatedProduct(Product:code)


Reference to B is not a mandatory field, but when there is value, its suppose to create FK relation.

When I try to save the object I get an error saying
Key attribute 'Product.relatedProduct' forms a circular reference back to 'Product'.
How can I create a integration object in this situation?

entry.title: how to read the name of groovy script sap cloud integration cpi
entry.content:
hi, I need to use the name of the groovy script inside the script to use it as the attachment name

For example the script name is Log Payload, I want the attachment to be called Log Payload

How can I do?

I've done some testing but am having problems, i tried this:

bur i have this error:

Thank you

entry.title: [XSLT]: Dynamic rows creation and values(in column) based on dynamic nested XML nodes
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Requirement is to send a CSV for a target system from the attached XML.

Source XML is from SFEC which contains department hierarchy and is dynamic for each employees, we need to create the number of rows in CSV based on the department hierarchy for each employee and is achieved already with the attached XSLT. The challenge here is the misalignment of the values in the columns. 

Any leads, suggestion to achieve the desired output within the XSLT would be really helpful.

Regards,

Pavan

entry.title: Hi, we are getting below error javax.net.ssl.SSLHandshakeException: sun.security.validator.Validator
entry.content:
Hi we are getting below error while uploading certificate in KX2 test system In SAP PI/PO.

Could you please suggest me to resolve the issue.

entry.title: REST API Call for downloading file
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on SAP PO 7.5 to download the file from AWS S3 bucket. so i have followed the blogs

(https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-download-a-file-from-amazon-s3-buckets/ba-p/13419722)

 

on the same and have used "GET" call instead of PUT and interface is OK and getting response 200 in the monitoring. the file is coming in the payload and i have to download this file in some NFS folder.

Could you please let me know how can i get this file in the NFS folder directly. please note i am not using request/response(Sync) call here.

 

thanks

entry.title: Principle propagation for non SAP sender in PI 7.50 AEX
entry.content:
Hello expert

we have a typical requirement for Java front-end to call ECC backend, REST - PI - ECC. However they require user authorization (Authority Check) in backend based on the user who calls the API. Normally we use ECC service user to call the ABAP proxy from PI, to allow using end user calling ECC from frontend, the only option is Principle propagation.

I've done lots of research on PP, none of them provided definite answer.

From SAP help (https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_scm700_ehp02/7.0.2/en-us/81/6d7e8093134d4f8417a2e780a3393f/frameset.htm), it seems that PP is only possible between SAP systems, as it mentioned you'd need to configure Trusted Relationship between Sender and PI, and between PI and backend, those configuration are SAP specific.

So my question is: is it possible to use PP between non SAP frontend and SAP backend? if yes, how to configure it? (including configuring Trusted Relationship in non-SAP system / application)

thank you so much

Jayson

entry.title: PI/PO7.5 Background Job Processing Monitor -User roles
entry.content:
Hi,

Q1. Can you please suggest the user roles to restrict EDIT access for 'Background Job Processing Monitor' in PI/PO message monitoring. 

Configuration and monitoring home-->Monitoring-->Adapter engine tab-->Background Job Processing Monitor: Process Jobs

the current roles assigned to user are: SAP_XI_DEVELOPER_J2EE , SAP_XI_MONITOR_J2EE,SAP_XI_SUPPORT_J2EE,SAP_XI_RWB_SERV_USER.

Q2: When assigned the NWA_Readonly role, I am still able to see the 'Identity Management' section (display) and the list of users created. I would like to restrict access to the 'Identity Management' option; please suggest ways to hide it so that the user cannot view the list of all users created. I tried using the 'SAP_JAVA_NWADMIN_CENTRAL/LOCAL_READONLY' roles, but they restrict access to many other tools as well. So, I want to use the NWA_READONLY role, but it should not show the 'Identity Management' section.

Thank you.

entry.title: Shortening Source File name in SAP PO !
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a passthrough scenario in SAP PO 7.5 and files are picked up from SFTP folder and placing into a File server keeping the same file name from the Source SFTP.

Now we need to truncate the file name . 

If the file name at Source is ABC_12345_LKN.8URTY.txt  then we need to write the file at the target File server with the name as ABC_12345.txt 

I have created dummy DT, MT and SI, mapping, operation mapping and using the following UDF but getting error in sender channel. Please suggest here

Error:

 

 

Please suggest how can this be achieved .

 

Regards,

Arvik

entry.title: SAP Process Integration (SAP PI PO) Local rule routing condition
entry.content:
Hello ,  

In integrated configuration , i have to add a condition like when zregiogroup = 'eng' or 'mech' and werks = 'p020' or 'p025' or 'p089' or... Then that needs to passed to receiver. Please find the attachment for reference. I'm not able to find the solution. Please help me!!
